zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean V Comte de Ponthieu, Comte d'Aumale於1284年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆可雷希--朋提額時，他的父親Jean I Comte De Ponthieu, Comte D'aumale,29歲，母親Ide de Beaumont-Meulan25歲。他於1320年9月與Catherine Normandy De Artois在法國阿托斯結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1343年1月16日在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利奧馬爾享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean V Comte de Ponthieu, Comte d'Aumale于1284年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆可雷希--朋提額时，他的父亲Jean I Comte De Ponthieu, Comte D'aumale,29岁，母亲Ide de Beaumont-Meulan25岁。他于1320年9月与Catherine Normandy De Artois在法国阿托斯结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1343年1月16日在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利奧馬爾享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ponthieu,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: variant of Ponthieu, a habitational name from Ponthieu, a region (former county) in Picardy, between the rivers Authie and Somme.

nameMeanings.name: Comte
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jean Jacques.
French:

nickname for someone in the service of a count or for someone who behaved pretentiously, from Old French conte, cunte ‘count’. In North America, this surname is also a shortened form of the French cognate Lecomte . Compare Conte 3.

variants.name: Lecomte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Monique, Normand, Alain, Armand, Cecile, Dominique, Francois, Germain, Gilles, Gregoire, Huguette, Pierre.

French and Walloon: nickname for someone in the service of a count or for someone who behaved pretentiously, from Old French conte, cunte ‘count’, with fused masculine definite article le. Compare Comte 1.
History: This surname is listed (in the form Le Comte) in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: New Testament: ‘God is gracious’. See John .

variants.name: Jeane
meanings: Variant spelling of   Jean .

nameMeanings.name: Comte

nickname for someone in the service of a count or for someone who behaved pretentiously, from Old French conte, cunte ‘count’. In North America, this surname is also a shortened form of the French cognate Lecomte . Compare Conte 3.

variants.name: Lecomte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Monique, Normand, Alain, Armand, Cecile, Dominique, Francois, Germain, Gilles, Gregoire, Huguette, Pierre.

French and Walloon: nickname for someone in the service of a count or for someone who behaved pretentiously, from Old French conte, cunte ‘count’, with fused masculine definite article le. Compare Comte 1.
History: This surname is listed (in the form Le Comte) in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

en.lifeSummary: When Jean V Comte de Ponthieu, Comte d'Aumale was born in 1284, in Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Jean I Comte De Ponthieu, Comte D'aumale,, was 29 and his mother, Ide de Beaumont-Meulan, was 25. He married Catherine Normandy De Artois in September 1320, in Artois, France. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 16 January 1343, in Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean V Comte de Ponthieu, Comte d'Aumale est né en 1284, à Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Jean I Comte De Ponthieu, Comte D'aumale,, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Ide de Beaumont-Meulan, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Normandy De Artois en septembre 1320, à Artois, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 16 janvier 1343, à Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean V Comte de Ponthieu, Comte d'Aumale 1284 in Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jean I Comte De Ponthieu, Comte D'aumale, 29 und seine Mutter Ide de Beaumont-Meulan 25. Er hat im September 1320 in Artois, Frankreich Catherine Normandy De Artois geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 16. Januar 1343 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean V Comte de Ponthieu, Comte d'Aumale è nato il nel 1284 nel Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Jean I Comte De Ponthieu, Comte D'aumale,, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Ide de Beaumont-Meulan, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Catherine Normandy De Artois nel settembre 1320, nel Artois, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 16 gennaio 1343, nel Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean V Comte de Ponthieu, Comte d'Aumaleが1284年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメクルeシ-エン-プオンスイエウで生まれた時，父Jean I Comte De Ponthieu, Comte D'aumale,は29歳，母Ide de Beaumont-Meulanは25歳であった。1320年9月にフランスアルトイスでCatherine Normandy De Artoisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1343年1月16日にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメアウマルで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean V Comte de Ponthieu, Comte d'Aumale(이)가 1284년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 크e시--폰스이외에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jean I Comte De Ponthieu, Comte D'aumale,(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Ide de Beaumont-Meulan(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1320년 9월 프랑스 아토이스에서 Catherine Normandy De Artois(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1343년 1월 16일 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 오마일에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean V Comte de Ponthieu, Comte d'Aumale nasceu em 1284, em Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Jean I Comte De Ponthieu, Comte D'aumale,, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Ide de Beaumont-Meulan, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine Normandy De Artois em setembro de 1320, em Artois, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de janeiro de 1343, em Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean V Comte de Ponthieu, Comte d'Aumale родился в 1284 г. в местности крeси-ен-понтиеу, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Jean I Comte De Ponthieu, Comte D'aumale, было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Ide de Beaumont-Meulan, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Normandy De Artois сентябрь 1320 г. в местности артоис, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 16 января 1343 г. в местности аумеил, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean V Comte de Ponthieu, Comte d'Aumale nació en 1284, en Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Jean I Comte De Ponthieu, Comte D'aumale,, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Ide de Beaumont-Meulan, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Catherine Normandy De Artois en septiembre de 1320, en Artois, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 16 de enero de 1343, en Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 59 años.
